Rated 5 out of 5 stars #### Great sound and battery Taylor | Verified Purchase Posted 8 months ago. These earbuds sound excellent, the battery lasts all day, and pairing was quick. I would recommend this to a friend. Helpful (12)Unhelpful (0)
